name: SettingsPanel
description: A compact settings panel with grouped toggle switches, select dropdowns, and text inputs. Designed to be embedded in dashboards, modals, or sidebars as a composable settings section.

visual.description: Card with grouped settings sections separated by dividers. Each setting has a label, optional description, and a control (toggle, select, or input) aligned to the right. Uses subtle borders and spacing between groups.

props.name: sections
props.description: Array of setting section objects with label and items array. Each item has: key, label, description, type ('toggle' | 'select' | 'input'), value, and options (for select type)

props.name: showSaveButton
props.description: Whether to show a save button at the bottom
